chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3483 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) 1. For orders on CMA No.17206/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders as to non-prosecution. 26.08.2025. Ms. Rizwana Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioner. ************* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and the alternate remedy has been provided; therefore, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the petitioner to approach learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
